name: BarRow
goal: Single horizontal progress-bar row usable standalone or as a slot child inside <ce-bar-chart> (CDR-005 slot mode).
description: Carries a numeric value (0..max), optional color, rich label slot, and meta slot. When nested inside ce-bar-chart the parent reads value/color as attributes and consumes the label/meta slot HTML via querySelectorAll — the row renders nothing (display:contents). When used standalone it renders a complete single-row bar with ARIA progressbar semantics, label, animated fill, and meta. The value-display attribute controls where the numeric value appears: inside the fill (default), outside to the right, or hidden. Rich label/meta content is supported per CDR-002: the slots can carry <span>, <a>, <ce-chip>, or any inline element.
limitations: Standalone rendering always scales fill as value/max — there is no auto-scale across sibling rows. Use ce-bar-chart for a multi-row auto-scaling chart. When nested inside ce-bar-chart, the max attribute on ce-bar-row is ignored; the parent chart's own max/auto-scale governs fill width.

props.name: value
props.description: The bar value. In standalone mode fill = value/max × 100. Drives aria-valuenow. Also read by ce-bar-chart parent in slot mode.

props.name: max
props.description: Maximum value for standalone fill calculation. fill = value/max × 100. Ignored when nested inside ce-bar-chart (parent governs scale).

props.name: color
props.description: Fill color. Named token ("blue", "green", "amber", "purple", "cyan", "red") or arbitrary CSS color. Default: blue. Also read by ce-bar-chart parent in slot mode.

props.name: label
props.description: Plain-text label shown left of the track. Rich slot="label" content wins over this attribute when both are supplied.

props.name: meta
props.description: Plain-text meta suffix shown right of the bar (e.g. "9 agents", "+12%"). Rich slot="meta" content wins when both are supplied.

props.name: valueDisplay
props.description: Where to render the numeric value. "inside": inside the fill bar (default). "outside": to the right of the track, before meta. "hidden": not rendered. CDR-001 style enum — 3 finite values.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Rich label content for the leading label column. Can carry <span>, <a>, <ce-chip>, or any inline element per CDR-002. Wins over the `label` attribute when both are supplied.

slots.name: meta
slots.description: Trailing meta content (e.g. +12%, trend marker, count). Displayed to the right of the bar. Wins over the `meta` attribute when both are supplied.

cssVariables.name: --ce-bar-row-fill
cssVariables.description: Fill color set via :host([color='…']) selectors for named tokens. Override to set a custom color without the `color` attribute.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Bar inner horizontal padding in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-radius-sm
cssVariables.description: Corner radius for track and fill in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Label, meta, and outside-value text color in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text
cssVariables.description: Inline fill text color in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-sm
cssVariables.description: Label font size in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Inline value, outside value, and meta font size in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Fill width transition; automatically disabled via prefers-reduced-motion media query.

a11y.notes: In standalone mode exposes role=progressbar with aria-valuemin=0, aria-valuemax=max, aria-valuenow=value, and aria-label derived from slot text, then label attribute, then formatted value. When nested inside ce-bar-chart the parent handles all ARIA — the row renders nothing. The label slot can carry any semantic HTML.
